My black and white hair is tucked messily under the hat, with a few stray strands escaping. images.alt: The visual is a chaotic and visceral Abstract Expressionist masterpiece, dominated by a tumultuous explosion of thick impasto paint. The texture is incredibly heavy, with knife-edge ridges and deep grooves where the paint has been aggressively applied. The colors are a storm of deep, midnight blues blending violently with radiant golds and fiery crimsons, representing the climb and the celestial release. My form isn't distinct, but suggested by the sweeping arcs of black and white—a ghostly silhouette twisting through the center of the composition, surrounded by jagged, frantic slashes of charcoal and oil. It feels like a scream and a whisper simultaneously, captured in motion. The lighting is internal, glowing from within the layers of paint, creating a sense of depth and raw intensity. The vibe is transcendental, messy, and overwhelmingly emotional—an abstract landscape of a soul breaking free.
